nasb.text: And the land could not sustain them while dwelling together, for their possessions were so great that they were not able to remain together.

esv.text: so that the land could not support both of them dwelling together; for their possessions were so great that they could not dwell together,

cnv.text: 那地容不下他們住在一起；因為他們的財物很多，所以他們再也不能住在一起。

ccb.text: 他们的牲畜很多，那地方容纳不下，他们无法住在一起。

csbs.text: 那地容不下他们一起住，因为他们的财物很多，以致他们不能住在一起。
